objective: Build point-in-time data quality monitoring and market state tags from the V3.47 daily-only diagnostic feature layer.
forbidden: Do not read raw daily CSVs.
Do not compute return labels, adjusted returns, total returns, valuation, dividends, or portfolio performance.
Do not use full-sample quantiles for state labels.
Do not promote states into a model or trading rule.
acceptance: State panel rows must equal V3.47 feature rows.
Trailing percentiles must use prior observations only.
Data scope must remain accepted_processed_daily_only and price_adjustment none_raw.
No bad OHLC rows may remain.
No forbidden return or valuation columns may be produced.
The report must state that no model or backtest promotion occurred.
